name: Apple Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Cream cheese (32 oz, softened for 2 mins in microwave)
Eggs (5 jumbo, shelled & warmed for 25 secs in microwave)
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Mix well and pat into a 10-inch springform pan.
Cake:
1. Beat cheese until light and fluffy.
2. Add sugar and beat again.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each.
4. Add remaining ingredients except applesauce and mix well.
5. Stir in applesauce.
6. Pour into crust and bake at 350°F for 1 hour with a pan of water on the oven bottom.
- Cake is done when edges are firm and middle is soft.
- Run knife around edge to loosen.
- Top with crumble topping and return to oven for 10 minutes.
- Chill thoroughly.
Topping:
1. Mix until crumbly and sprinkle on top of cake.
